assumptions: No Dynatrace account, trial environment, tenant access, API token, OneAgent installation, or monitored host is assumed.
For the downstream OneAgent candidate, the developer controls a clean Linux, Windows, or AIX host with administrator access and SSL-capable network connectivity.
No signup, environment creation, token generation, software download, installation, process restart, or data ingestion was performed during research.

developer_goal: Use the public Dynatrace Playground to explore and interact with live dashboards, notebooks, and sample observability data without installing software.

first_success.outcome: The developer opens the Dynatrace Playground and interacts with a live dashboard or notebook backed by sample data.
first_success.observable_signal: A Playground dashboard or notebook loads and displays interactive sample observability data.

route_selection.rule: Select the lexicographically shortest complete official route to the same first-success outcome after fixing product intent; if peer routes remain consequential, mark needs-human-judgment.

candidates.name: Dynatrace Playground sample-data exploration
candidates.reason: Recorded as a reconstructable candidate, but public evidence does not close signup-field opacity and/or peer-route lexicographic selection for a verified count.

candidates.name: OpenTelemetry ingestion
candidates.reason: The general guide presents OpenTelemetry beside OneAgent and does not select it for every infrastructure.

candidates.name: OneAgent trial ingestion
candidates.reason: It requires a trial environment, administrator-controlled host, token, download, installation, and process restart; Playground reaches a working exploration sooner.

required_path.action: Complete Dynatrace account creation or trial signup at the official entry URL.

required_fields.label: Signup identity and required account fields
required_fields.notes: Public evidence does not establish the complete current required field set behind the client-rendered or authenticated signup surface.

required_path.observable_result: A new Dynatrace account or trial session exists.

required_path.action: Complete any required email or identity verification for the new account.
required_path.observable_result: The account becomes usable for developer onboarding.

required_path.action: Complete the documented post-login setup for the selected Dynatrace candidate through first success.

required_fields.label: Candidate-specific configuration
required_fields.notes: Exact fields depend on unresolved product, auth, or framework selection.

required_path.observable_result: A Playground dashboard or notebook loads and displays interactive sample observability data.

prerequisites.description: {'order': 1, 'type': 'account', 'requirement': 'Complete the official Playground signup or use an existing Dynatrace account whose environment switcher exposes Playground.', 'required': True, 'source_ids': ['S5', 'S6']}
{'order': 2, 'type': 'software', 'requirement': 'Use a web browser; no agent installation is required.', 'required': True, 'source_ids': ['S5']}

external_gates.description: The public trial endpoint does not expose the required identity, agreement, account, tenant, or environment transition.
The official general guide leaves OneAgent versus OpenTelemetry ingestion to the developer.
OneAgent requires administrator access to a clean supported host.

unavoidable_waits.description: Email or identity-provider verification delivery when the selected account route requires it.

excluded.reason: Listed as excluded after success in the source record.
Listed as excluded after success in the source record.
Listed as excluded after success in the source record.
Listed as excluded after success in the source record.

uncertainties.question: What exact current required signup, identity, legal, and entitlement fields does Dynatrace show for a new developer, and which peer route is the lexicographic shortest path?
uncertainties.impact: Without those fields and a closed route choice, action and field counts cannot be verified for peer comparison.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: A dated read-only walkthrough of the live signup and the selected post-login first-success path, with screenshots of required fields and confirmation that peer routes are longer or gated.
